headline: Jim Cramer Recommends Buying Constellation Energy
summary: Constellation Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:CEG) was among Jim Cramer’s stock calls on Mad Money, as he highlighted worthy space players and reviewed several of this year’s IPOs.
